title: message_set sends Chat not PeerDeliver: remote peers cannot route to chatId
description: jmap.rs message_set broadcasts ClearMessage::Chat when MLS active. Remote daemons handle PeerDeliver (routes to correct chat via insert_message_ext) but handle Chat as unrouted broadcast-only. Messages created via JMAP are lost on peer daemons - not stored in correct channel. Fix: send ClearMessage::PeerDeliver with chat_id, message_id, sent_at.
